name: Journalism
student_summary: Report the news — print, broadcast and digital.
overview: Report the news — print, broadcast and digital. Journalism sits in the Media & News family of Communication, Marketing & Sales. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You express yourself best in writing
who_should_avoid: Intense competition drains you — entry here is a contest
daily_responsibilities: Apply reporting & verification to real problems
Collaborate with your team using interviewing
Keep improving at news writing — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
problem_solving_style: Adaptive — mix analysis, action and people skills as the situation demands
alternative_paths: Build an audience/portfolio first — degrees optional
scope: Demand outlook in India is strong; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: A broad Media & News foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Fierce competition for the best seats and roles
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Journalism is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of interviewing
projects: Beginner: explore reporting & verification with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using CMS
smaller_city_scope: Concentrated in bigger hubs today; smaller-city presence is growing slowly.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Broadcasting & Anchoring: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Content Creation & New Media: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Science Communication: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Journalism pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹15 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on English, Polity. Typical degrees: B.A. Journalism/Mass Comm, Any degree + journalism PG. Alternatives exist: build an audience/portfolio first — degrees optional.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Journalism evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Journalism is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
